_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of best practices from industry and academia in test design activities for verification and validation of AI and machine learning systems.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing comprehensive AI test plans covering functional performance, fairness, robustness, safety, and operational requirements, with defined pass/fail criteria for each dimension.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-003 (RM, cosine: 0.606), SP-T-009 (SP, cosine: 0.599).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.536). Shared vocabulary: [ai, test]. DCWF-only terms [academia, activities, best, design, industry, knowledge] vs WIDAI-only terms [comprehensive, covering, criteria, defined, designing, dimension] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.883, R=0.850). P exceeds R by 0.033 — the DCWF element's 22 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of best practices from industry and academia in test design activities" and "Skill in designing comprehensive AI test plans covering functional performance," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.633 > STS 0.536 (gap +0.097). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ai, test] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.2%. Shared tokens: [ai, test]. DCWF-only: [academia, activities, best, design, industry, knowledge]. WIDAI-only: [comprehensive, covering, criteria, defined, designing, dimension].

signals.detail: STS 0.536 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
